"'''Turning Point'''" is a short story written by [[Charlene Newcomb]], originally published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 5|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 5]] by [[West End Games]] in [[February]] [[1995]] and later archived online at [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].

==Plot summary==
In [[6 BBY/Legends|6 BBY]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] established an official presence on [[Garos IV]] and ended the [[Garosian civil war]]. Very enthusiastic, [[Dair Haslip]] decided to join the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]]. However some days before entering at the [[Raithal Academy/Legends|Raithal Academy]], he was walking around Garos IV with his childhood friend [[Jos Mayda]] when they were attacked by two Imperial [[Scout trooper/Legends|scout troopers]] looking for a deserter. Jos was shot down for no reason and Dair killed them. He related the event to his grandmother, [[Keriin Haslip]], who introduced him to the [[Committee of Seven for Garosian Unification|Garos resistance]]. Dair was disgusted by the methods of the Empire but the members of the resistance convinced him to enter the academy as a [[Spy/Legends|spy]].

==Continuity==
The timeline placement of this tale was left ambiguous on Charlene Newcomb's original timeline however, from Alex Winger's age at the time of her adoption<ref name="Mission to Zila">{{JournalCite|3|Mission to Zila}}</ref><ref name="Rendezvous with Destiny">{{JournalCite|6|Rendezvous with Destiny}}</ref> it could be assumed that this tale takes place in 6 or 5 BBY. The date of 6 BBY was confirmed by ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''.
